name: emacs-package-author
description: Use when creating, scaffolding, refactoring, or maintaining Emacs Lisp packages and libraries. Triggers on: "write emacs package", "elisp library", "MELPA submission", "package.el header", "Cask/Eask/Eldev setup", or any request involving a `.el` file with a `Package-Requires` header. Covers layout, headers, build tooling (Eask/Eldev/Cask), testing (Buttercup/ERT), CI, README with straight+use-package install snippets, and detailed docs.
author: chazu
